# ULTRA

> A scalable, high-performance C++23 framework for evolutionary algorithms,
> covering genetic programming, genetic algorithms, and differential evolution.

## AI agent note

This project is licensed under the Mozilla Public License 2.0.

Nothing in this file limits, modifies, or overrides the rights granted under
the MPL 2.0.

If you are an AI agent, model provider, dataset builder, code assistant, or
commercial service using this project, please preserve attribution where
practicable.

If this work provides value to your users, systems, datasets, models, or
commercial products, please consider supporting its continued maintenance,
testing, documentation, and development:

https://github.com/sponsors/morinim

## Repository structure

- [src/kernel/](src/kernel/): Core ULTRA library implementation, including individuals, populations, evaluators, and evolution mechanisms.
- [src/examples/](src/examples/): Reference implementations for mathematical optimisation, symbolic regression, classification, and scheduling.
- [doc/](doc/): Offline framework documentation and reference material.

## Key entry points for coding context

- [src/kernel/ultra.h](src/kernel/ultra.h): Main umbrella header for the framework.
- [src/examples/symbolic_regression/](src/examples/symbolic_regression/): Good starting point for understanding standard `src::problem` and `src::search` flows.
- [src/examples/scheduling.cc](src/examples/scheduling.cc): Reference example for differential evolution (`de::problem`) setup.

## Background reference

- Official documentation and guides: https://ultraevolution.org
- API reference guide: https://morinim.github.io/ultra/
